titleStmt.title: SII 34.137: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 137. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District.

summary.p: At the entrance into the kitchen in the Piplikēśvara temple, right side.

Records a sale of land, made tax-free, to the temple of Tiruveṟumbiyūr-Mahādēva by the sabhā, who met in the temple of Tirumērkōyil-Āḻvār on the occasion. The river Arumoḻidēva-pērāṟu is mentioned among the boundaries of the sold land. Some twelve members of the sabhā attested to the document. The writer was the madhyastha called Kaṇattāṉ Chentāmaraikkaṇṇan alias Aiyyāyirap-piriyan.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
p puvimātuvaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpat taṉṉiru patumalar maṉṉavar cūṭa maṉṉiya Urimaiyil maṇimuṭicūṭi ceṅkōl ceṉṟu ti
li laṟantaḻaippak kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭamalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi vīrar Uṭaṉ naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru kuṭai niḻaṟṟic cempoṉ vīrasiṅhāsana
run=taruḷiya kōpparakēcari panmarāṉa tribhuvanac cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīvikkirama cōḻadevaṟkuyāṇṭu 4 Āvatu pāṇṭi kulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu mikōḻai brahmadeyam cīkaṇṭa catu
tirumēṟkōyil Āḻvār kōyilē kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu tiruveṟumpiyūr malai māhā devar kōyil caṇṭēśvara tēvarkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭut
rājādhirāja vatikkuk kiḻakku kulōttuṅka cōḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku Ukaṇāṟṟum 3 kaṇāṟṟum tenpārkkellai paracamaiya kōḷari*
kellai kaṅkai koṇṭa cōḻan pōkkukku kiḻakku tiruvāyppāṭi Āḻvār tirunantavānattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapākkellai
kellai Arumoḻitēva pērāṟṟaṅkaraikkum Amāvācip puṟattukku mēṟku Āka Ivvicaitta perunānkellai Uṭpa
nilam Iṉnilam Iraṇṭaraiyum mikutikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka viṟṟukuṭuttu koḷvatāna Emmilli�
Anṟāṭu naṟkācu 8 m Innilattukku Iṟai viḻutta Iṭṭa kācu 10 8- m Āka kācu 2 10 6 Ikkācu Irupattāṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiyē kai
koṇṭu Iccaṇṭēcuvara māhādevaṟku Innilam Iraṇṭaraiyum Ikkācu Irupattāṟum koṇṭu Iṟaiyiliyē cantrātittavaṟ ce
peruṅkuṟimāhāsabhai vaṭipaṇiyāl Āti madhyastan kaṇattān centāmaraikkaṇṇannāna Aiyyāyirappiriyanēn
māppāni caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ cīkālimāṟan sayiñaiyātanmaikku Ivai nārāyaṇan caṅkaranārāyaṇanēn Ivai En Eḻuttu Itu valavūr cen
tanmaikku peruṅkāviṟṟūr kāri caṅkaranārāyaṇannē Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku valavūrmāppāni teṟṟi mācaṟu cōti Eḻu
nacēnta sayiññaiyānamaikku Ivai valavūr māppāni māṟan tiruveyan teṟṟi Eḻuttu Itu valavūr kaṭampa nārāyaṇan ca
yāna cīrāḷan Ampalaṅ kōyil koṇṭān Eḻuttu Itu valavūr māppāni teṟṟi tiruvēṅkaṭattān cayiññaiyātanmai
kanen Ivai En Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēn ciṟukōṭṭaiyū nakkan mētāviyēn Ivai En Eḻuttu Itu valavūr cēnta
maikku Ūrkaṇakku mala Uṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai peruṅkāvil Utaiyativākaran mātavanēn Ivai En E
vūr nakkan ciṅka nātan sayiññaiyānamaikku valavūr māppāni tiruvēṅkaṭavanāna tiruven teṟṟiyēn Ivai En Eḻu
ṭūr māyāna nanta kōvintanē Ivai En Eḻuttu Ivai valavūr māppāni teṟṟi kāri Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
